name: [GRIDHAND] Competitor Monitor Agent - Competitor gets negative review → alert owner with opportuni

gridhand.scenario: Competitor gets negative review → alert owner with opportunity
gridhand.description: When a competitor's business receives a negative review on platforms like Yelp or Google Reviews, the GRIDHAND automation workflow is triggered to immediately alert the owner of the opportunity to win over dissatisfied customers. The system sends a timely notification to the owner's smartphone via the GRIDHAND mobile app, providing details of the negative review and the competitor's business, allowing the owner to craft a targeted response or promotion to attract these potential customers to their own business. By receiving these alerts, the business owner can capitalize on their competitor's mistakes and increase their own customer base, ultimately driving sales and revenue growth for their business.
